basic_details.job_title: Mail Motor Service Bangalore Skilled Artisans Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Painter, Carpenter and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mail Motor Service Bangalore Skilled Artisans Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website indiapost.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Mail Motor Service Bangalore Skilled Artisans Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI Certificate in relevant trade (Mechanic/Carpenter/Painter) or equivalent
qualification.details: ITI Certificate in relevant trade (Mechanic/Carpenter/Painter) or equivalent.

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Trade Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.indiapost.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Mail Motor Service Bangalore Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Mail Motor Service Bangalore Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.indiapost.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Mail Motor Service Bangalore Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mail Motor Service Bangalore Skilled Artisans posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Skilled Artisans posts at Mail Motor Service Bangalore is 18th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Skilled Artisans?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Skilled Artisans posts announced by Mail Motor Service Bangalore in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the eligibility criteria for the Skilled Artisans posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an ITI Certificate in the relevant trade (Mechanic, Carpenter, or Painter) or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Skilled Artisans recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Skilled Artisans posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200 per month, corresponding to Pay Level-2.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Mail Motor Service Bangalore Skilled Artisans jobs?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Skill Test, Trade Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Skilled Artisans recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Which trades are included under the Skilled Artisans category?
faq.answer: The Skilled Artisans category includes trades such as Mechanic, Carpenter, and Painter.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of India Post, www.indiapost.gov.in. A direct link to the PDF is provided in the Important Links section.
